clusters_collapsed: 23 raw findings -> 16 dedupe clusters -> 22 final (5 proximity false-merges split back apart during adjudication; net 1 true collapse)

notes.quarantine: multi-agent reviewer 'bob2' (NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B) emitted 586 of 603 raw findings in a repetition loop (502x 'Inconsistent test naming', 67x 'Inconsistent comment style' stamped across consecutive line numbers of pagerank_test.go). Excluded entirely before dedupe. Original contaminated stream preserved at multi-agent/td-stream.txt.bak-runaway.
notes.attribution_fix: Per-row REVIEWER column in the multi-agent fan-out was mislabeled (dax/vera/brad rows tagged 'bruce'; archer tagged 'base-reviewer'). Rebuilt multi-agent/td-stream.txt from raw/<agent>/td-stream.txt with REVIEWER corrected to the authoritative raw-dir agent name. 17 legitimate findings retained from dax(5), greta(3), vera(3), bruce(2), archer(2), otto(1), brad(1).
notes.confidence: All 22 final findings are MEDIUM. No genuine 2+-distinct-reviewer agreement on the same issue exists after quarantine; every HIGH-confidence cluster the dedupe proposed was a line-proximity false-merge of distinct concerns.
notes.harness_bugs: Two upstream multi-agent harness issues surfaced: (1) no runaway/repetition cap let bob2 emit 586 near-duplicate rows with status=ok; (2) per-row reviewer attribution does not reliably match the emitting agent.
